feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Bank Rules Update: इन बैंकों ने बदले मिनिमम बैलेंस और लेनदेन के नियम वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Bank Rules Update: इन बैंकों ने बदले मिनिमम बैलेंस और लेनदेन के नियम वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
In the Corona Crisis, where people are facing economic crisis, some banks have given a shock to their account holders. Bank of Maharashtra, Axis Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank and RBL Bank have announced a change in the rules to impose a charge on the minimum balance from 1 August. Along with this, it has also been decided to charge a fee after three free transactions.
कोरोना काल में जहां लोग आर्थिक संकट से जूझ रहे हैं वहीं कुछ बैंकों ने अपने खाताधारकों को झटका दिया है. बैंक ऑफ महाराष्ट्र, एक्सिस बैंक, कोटक महिंद्रा बैंक और आरबीएल बैंक ने नियमों में बदलाव कर 1 अगस्त से न्यूनतम बैलेंस पर चार्ज लगाने की घोषणा की है. इसके साथ ही तीन मुफ्त लेनदेन के बाद शुल्क भी वसूलने का भी फैसला किया है.
#BankAccount #MinimumBalanceCharge #CashWithdrawal
entry.summary: In the Corona Crisis, where people are facing economic crisis, some banks have given a shock to their account holders. Bank of Maharashtra, Axis Bank, Kotak Mahindra Bank and RBL Bank have announced a change in the rules to impose a charge on the minimum balance from 1 August. Along with this, it has also been decided to charge a fee after three free transactions. कोरोना काल में जहां लोग आर्थिक संकट से जूझ रहे हैं वहीं कुछ बैंकों ने अपने खाताधारकों को झटका दिया है. बैंक ऑफ महाराष्ट्र, एक्सिस बैंक, कोटक महिंद्रा बैंक और आरबीएल बैंक ने नियमों में बदलाव कर 1 अगस्त से न्यूनतम बैलेंस पर चार्ज लगाने की घोषणा की है. इसके साथ ही तीन मुफ्त लेनदेन के बाद शुल्क भी वसूलने का भी फैसला किया है. #BankAccount #MinimumBalanceCharge #CashWithdrawal

entry.title: Comment la COVID-19 menace la santé et les droit des femmes en Côte d’Ivoire

link.title: Comment la COVID-19 menace la santé et les droit des femmes en Côte d’Ivoire

entry.content: À l’occasion de la célébration de la journée mondiale de la population, le thème retenu cette année est : "ralentir la propagation de la COVID-19, comment protéger la santé et les droits des femmes et des filles actuelle ".
entry.summary: À l’occasion de la célébration de la journée mondiale de la population, le thème retenu cette année est : "ralentir la propagation de la COVID-19, comment protéger la santé et les droits des femmes et des filles actuelle ".

entry.title: Flood alert in Bihar, Koshi above danger level

link.title: Flood alert in Bihar, Koshi above danger level

entry.content: Moderate to heavy rainfall in north Bihar and the catchment areas of Nepal for the last three days has resulted in flood-like situation in several areas. Many rivers in north Bihar maintained a rising trend and some were flowing above the danger mark.
entry.summary: Moderate to heavy rainfall in north Bihar and the catchment areas of Nepal for the last three days has resulted in flood-like situation in several areas. Many rivers in north Bihar maintained a rising trend and some were flowing above the danger mark.

entry.title: Rashami Desai Cries Talking About Her Special Bond With Late Sushant Singh Rajput SpotboyE

link.title: Rashami Desai Cries Talking About Her Special Bond With Late Sushant Singh Rajput SpotboyE

entry.content: #SushantSinghRajput’s death has left his friends, family and industry colleagues in a state of shock. Here’s a teary eyed #RashamiDesai remembering the late actor. #SpotboyE

entry.title: Le Soudan criminalise l’excision et les mutilations génitales féminines

link.title: Le Soudan criminalise l’excision et les mutilations génitales féminines

entry.content:
Dans certains pays du monde, des pratiques barbares comme l’excision sont encore courantes.
Le Soudan faisait partie de ces pays, mais une nouvelle loi va enfin mettre fin à cette coutume.
Désormais, la mutilation génitale féminine est considérée comme un crime selon la loi soudanaise.
Il sera passible d’une peine allant jusqu’à trois ans de prison.
La transition sera encore difficile, car l’excision est une pratique solidement ancrée dans la coutume soudanaise.
L’excision est notamment considérée comme un moyen de préserver la chasteté et la pureté des femmes.
entry.summary: Dans certains pays du monde, des pratiques barbares comme l’excision sont encore courantes. Le Soudan faisait partie de ces pays, mais une nouvelle loi va enfin mettre fin à cette coutume. Désormais, la mutilation génitale féminine est considérée comme un crime selon la loi soudanaise. Il sera passible d’une peine allant jusqu’à trois ans de prison. La transition sera encore difficile, car l’excision est une pratique solidement ancrée dans la coutume soudanaise. L’excision est notamment considérée comme un moyen de préserver la chasteté et la pureté des femmes.

entry.title: Dozens swim to safety after floods trap cars in Palermo underpass

link.title: Dozens swim to safety after floods trap cars in Palermo underpass

entry.content:
Mud and water swept away the vehicles and left them blocked in a highway underpass.View on euronews

entry.title: Kaia Gerber, Paloma Elsesser, Adut Akech, and More Models Get Real About Mental Health

link.title: Kaia Gerber, Paloma Elsesser, Adut Akech, and More Models Get Real About Mental Health

entry.content:
It’s impossible to maintain success without caring for your mental health, yet it’s one of the least discussed aspects of being a model.
Director Shaina Danziger
‘Radar Blips’ & ‘Anomalous Phenomena’ by Transmission Tapes
entry.summary: It’s impossible to maintain success without caring for your mental health, yet it’s one of the least discussed aspects of being a model. Director Shaina Danziger ‘Radar Blips’ & ‘Anomalous Phenomena’ by Transmission Tapes

entry.title: Arjun Kapoor- Every one of us will have to adjust to the new normal

link.title: Arjun Kapoor- Every one of us will have to adjust to the new normal

entry.content: Actor Arjun Kapoor, who has stepped out to shoot after almost four months, says everyone will have to adjust to the new normal.
entry.summary: Actor Arjun Kapoor, who has stepped out to shoot after almost four months, says everyone will have to adjust to the new normal.

entry.title: Jean-Philippe Imparato (Peugeot) : Stellantis, le groupe issu de la fusion PSA Fiat Chrysler - 16 07

link.title: Jean-Philippe Imparato (Peugeot) : Stellantis, le groupe issu de la fusion PSA Fiat Chrysler - 16 07

entry.content:
Ce jeudi 16 juillet, Jean-Philippe Imparato, directeur de la marque Peugeot, est revenu sur le du nouveau géant automobile issu de du mariage PSA/Fiat Chrysler et l’explosion des ventes de voitures électriques, dans l’émission Good Morning Business présentée par Christophe Jakubyszyn. Good Morning Business est à voir ou écouter du lundi au vendredi sur BFM Business.
Dans "Good morning business", Christophe Jakubyszyn, Faïza Garel-Younsi et les journalistes de BFM Business (Nicolas Doze, Hedwige Chevrillon, Jean-Marc Daniel, Anthony Morel…) décryptent et analysent l’actualité économique, financière et internationale. Entrepreneurs, grands patrons, économistes et autres acteurs du monde du business… Ne ratez pas les interviews de la seule matinale économique de France, en télé et en radio.
BFM Business est la 1ère chaîne française d’information économique et financière en continu, avec des interviews exclusives de patrons, d’entrepreneurs, de politiques, d’experts et d’économistes afin de couvrir l’ensemble de l’actualité française et internationale. BFM Business vous propose aussi des conseils pour vos finances par des personnalités de référence dans les domaines du patrimoine, de l’immobilier ou des marchés financiers. Retrouvez tous les jours : Christophe Jakubyszyn, Faïza Garel-Younsi, Nicolas Doze, Hedwige Chevrillon, Jean-Marc Daniel, Anthony Morel, Guillaume Sommerer, Cédric Decoeur, Karine Vergniol, Grégoire Favet, Sébastien Couasnon, Emmanuel Lechypre, Benaouda Abdeddaïm, Stéphanie Coleau… BFM Business est disponible sur votre box (SFR : canal 46 / Orange : canal 228 / Bouygues : canal 242 / Canal : canal 108) ainsi qu’en direct et replay sur l’application BFM Business et le site : www.bfmbusiness.fr.
entry.summary: Ce jeudi 16 juillet, Jean-Philippe Imparato, directeur de la marque Peugeot, est revenu sur le du nouveau géant automobile issu de du mariage PSA/Fiat Chrysler et l’explosion des ventes de voitures électriques, dans l’émission Good Morning Business présentée par Christophe Jakubyszyn. Good Morning Business est à voir ou écouter du lundi au vendredi sur BFM Business. Dans "Good morning business", Christophe Jakubyszyn, Faïza Garel-Younsi et les journalistes de BFM Business (Nicolas Doze, Hedwige Chevrillon, Jean-Marc Daniel, Anthony Morel…) décryptent et analysent l’actualité économique, financière et internationale. Entrepreneurs, grands patrons, économistes et autres acteurs du monde du business… Ne ratez pas les interviews de la seule matinale économique de France, en télé et en radio. BFM Business est la 1ère chaîne française d’information économique et financière en continu, avec des interviews exclusives de patrons, d’entrepreneurs, de politiques, d’experts et d’économistes afin de couvrir l’ensemble de l’actualité française et internationale. BFM Business vous propose aussi des conseils pour vos finances par des personnalités de référence dans les domaines du patrimoine, de l’immobilier ou des marchés financiers. Retrouvez tous les jours : Christophe Jakubyszyn, Faïza Garel-Younsi, Nicolas Doze, Hedwige Chevrillon, Jean-Marc Daniel, Anthony Morel, Guillaume Sommerer, Cédric Decoeur, Karine Vergniol, Grégoire Favet, Sébastien Couasnon, Emmanuel Lechypre, Benaouda Abdeddaïm, Stéphanie Coleau… BFM Business est disponible sur votre box (SFR : canal 46 / Orange : canal 228 / Bouygues : canal 242 / Canal : canal 108) ainsi qu’en direct et replay sur l’application BFM Business et le site : www.bfmbusiness.fr.

entry.title: COVID-19 : Corona నుంచి కోలుకున్న వాళ్లకు Karnataka ప్రభుత్వం బంపర్ ఆఫర్..! Oneindia Telugu

link.title: COVID-19 : Corona నుంచి కోలుకున్న వాళ్లకు Karnataka ప్రభుత్వం బంపర్ ఆఫర్..! Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
The Karnataka government on Wednesday announced that an incentive of Rs 5,000 would be given to people who have recovered from the coronavirus infection and are willing to donate plasma to help cure other COVID-19 patients.
#COVID19
#Coronavirus
#Karnataka
#PlasmaTherapy
#plasma
#PlasmaTherapyInKarnataka
#COVID19CasesInKarnataka
#COVID19patients
#Karnataka
కరోనా వైరస్ వేగంగా విస్తరిస్తుండటంతో… వైరస్ బారిన పడిన వాళ్లు ప్రాణాలు కోల్పోకుండా చూడటంపై ప్రభుత్వాలు దృష్టి పెట్టాయి. మరణాల రేటును సాధ్యమైనంత వరకు తగ్గించడంపై ఫోకస్ చేస్తున్నాయి. ఈ క్రమంలోనే కరోనా కారణంగా ప్రాణప్రాయస్థితిలోకి జారుకున్న రోగులకు ప్లాస్మా థెరపీ అందిస్తున్నాయి.
entry.summary: The Karnataka government on Wednesday announced that an incentive of Rs 5,000 would be given to people who have recovered from the coronavirus infection and are willing to donate plasma to help cure other COVID-19 patients. #COVID19 #Coronavirus #Karnataka #PlasmaTherapy #plasma #PlasmaTherapyInKarnataka #COVID19CasesInKarnataka #COVID19patients #Karnataka కరోనా వైరస్ వేగంగా విస్తరిస్తుండటంతో… వైరస్ బారిన పడిన వాళ్లు ప్రాణాలు కోల్పోకుండా చూడటంపై ప్రభుత్వాలు దృష్టి పెట్టాయి. మరణాల రేటును సాధ్యమైనంత వరకు తగ్గించడంపై ఫోకస్ చేస్తున్నాయి. ఈ క్రమంలోనే కరోనా కారణంగా ప్రాణప్రాయస్థితిలోకి జారుకున్న రోగులకు ప్లాస్మా థెరపీ అందిస్తున్నాయి.

entry.title: [CH] Bolsas de plástico y mascarillas que se disuelven en agua que se puede beber

link.title: [CH] Bolsas de plástico y mascarillas que se disuelven en agua que se puede beber

entry.content: Una empresa chilena llamada Solubag ha desarrollado una nuevo material similar al plástico que se disuelve en agua y no contamina. Ya fabrican bolsas, mascarillas, gorros, cubrezapatos, y mucho más.
entry.summary: Una empresa chilena llamada Solubag ha desarrollado una nuevo material similar al plástico que se disuelve en agua y no contamina. Ya fabrican bolsas, mascarillas, gorros, cubrezapatos, y mucho más.

entry.title: The Manila Times CSI: Celebrity, Style, Inspiration Season 2 Episode 8

link.title: The Manila Times CSI: Celebrity, Style, Inspiration Season 2 Episode 8

entry.content:
The Manila Times CSI: Celebrity, Style, Inspiration Season 2 Episode 8
Find out the latest with the ever-gorgeous and talented actor Piolo #PapaP Pascual (@Piolo_Pascual / @PioloPascual_PH) and the return of GMA Network’s live broadcast of "All Out Sundays" following the strict quarantines on our #CertifiedCSI Reports; and @TessaMauricioArriola / @TMTTessa’s one-on-one interview on #TheTZone with PrimeTime Princess Barbie Forteza (@BarbaraForteza / @DealWithBARBIE). We also have Fan Girl Karen Kunawicz’s (@NazgulQueen) weekly #CSIWatchList recommendation.
FOLLOW US:
Twitter: @TheManilaTimes / Instagram: @manila.times
Reporter: @ChristinaAlpad / @TMTTeenaAlpad
Reporter: @IzaGabz / @TMTIzaIglesias
Director: @nxx._l
Head writer: @NNNRoque / @TMTNikaRoque
#TheManilaTimesCSI #BarbieFortezaOnTMTCSI

We also have Fan Girl Karen Kunawicz’s (@NazgulQueen) weekly #CSIWatchList recommendation. entry.title: NFL Players Seeking Opt-Out Clause

link.title: NFL Players Seeking Opt-Out Clause

entry.content: NFL players are seeking an opt-out clause in case training camp or the regular season is cut short because of Covid-19 concerns.

entry.title: Kulbhushan Jadhav Case: India ने Pakistan से कहा, बिना बाधा के दें Consular Access वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Kulbhushan Jadhav Case: India ने Pakistan से कहा, बिना बाधा के दें Consular Access वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Kulbhushan Jadhav Case: India told Pakistan, give consular access without hindrance. India has once again spoken to Pakistan about the consular access of retired Navy officer Kulbhushan Jadhav, who is jailed in Pakistan on charges of espionage. India has once again asked Pakistan to give consular access without any hindrance in the case of Kulbhushan Jadhav.
जासूसी के आरोप में पाकिस्तान के जेल में बंद भारत के रिटायर्ड नेवी अफसर कुलभूषण जाधव के काउंसुलर एक्सेस को लेकर एक बार फिर भारत ने पाकिस्तान से बात की है. भारत ने एक बार फिर पाकिस्तान से कहा है कि कुलभूषण जाधव के मामले में बिना किसी बाधा के काउंसुलर एक्सेस दे.
#KulbhushanJadhav #India #Pakistan
entry.summary: Kulbhushan Jadhav Case: India told Pakistan, give consular access without hindrance. India has once again spoken to Pakistan about the consular access of retired Navy officer Kulbhushan Jadhav, who is jailed in Pakistan on charges of espionage. India has once again asked Pakistan to give consular access without any hindrance in the case of Kulbhushan Jadhav. जासूसी के आरोप में पाकिस्तान के जेल में बंद भारत के रिटायर्ड नेवी अफसर कुलभूषण जाधव के काउंसुलर एक्सेस को लेकर एक बार फिर भारत ने पाकिस्तान से बात की है. भारत ने एक बार फिर पाकिस्तान से कहा है कि कुलभूषण जाधव के मामले में बिना किसी बाधा के काउंसुलर एक्सेस दे. #KulbhushanJadhav #India #Pakistan

entry.title: Asphalt 9 San Francisco Körfezdeki Şehir DS Automobiles DS E-TENSE

link.title: Asphalt 9 San Francisco Körfezdeki Şehir DS Automobiles DS E-TENSE

entry.content:
Asphalt 9 San Francisco Körfezdeki Şehir DS Automobiles DS E-TENSE
Hızlı Arabalarla Sizlerleyiz
Asfalt 9: Efsaneler Gameloft tarafından
App Store’dan indir
https: //itunes.apple.com/ph/app/aspha …
Play Store’dan indirin
https: //play.google.com/store/apps/de …
Microsoft Store’dan indirin
https: //www.microsoft.com/en-us/p/asp …
Dünyanın en korkusuz sürücülerini ele alın ve Asphalt 8: Airborne’un yaratıcılarından bir sonraki Asfalt Efsanesi olun.
Asphalt 9: Legends, Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini ve W Motors gibi ünlü üreticilerin gerçek bir hiper otomobilleri içerir. Hayalinizdeki yolculuğu seçin ve dünyanın dört bir yanındaki muhteşem konumlarda yarışın. Sınırlarınızı toz içinde bırakın ve Pistin Efsanesi olun!
ELLERİNİZİN PALMLARINDA BİR KONSOL DENEYİMİ
Her bir yarışı gerçek bir gişe rekorları kıran filme dönüştüren titizlikle ayrıntılı gerçek arabalar, HDR teknikleri ve çarpıcı görsel ve parçacık efektleriyle kendinizi bu hiper gerçekçi arcade yarış oyununa bırakın.
EN DEĞERLİ ARAÇLAR
Dünyanın en şaşırtıcı 50 makinesinden fazlasını toplayın. Her araç, şimdiye kadar herhangi bir Asfalt oyununun en arzu edilen dizilimini oluşturmak için estetiğine ve yüksek performansına göre dikkatle seçildi.
PARMAKLARINIZDA ÖZELLEŞTİRME
Aracınızın tam rengini ve malzemelerini tanımlamak için yeni araba düzenleyicisini kullanın. Ayrıca Jantların ve Fren Kaliperleri’nin rengini seçebilir ve sürüşlerinizi tamamen özelleştirmek için karbon parçaları ekleyebilirsiniz.
SOLUNUM YERLERİ
En şaşırtıcı gerçek dünya konumlarında 70 pistte yerçekimine meydan okuyan yarışların heyecanını hissedin. Amerikan vahşi doğasındaki dev kasırgalar etrafında yarışın, Himalayalar’daki heyelanlardan kaçının ve harika stuntlar yapmak için rampalara çarpın.
BİR ARCADE EĞLENCE
Nihai Nitro Pulse’u serbest bırakmak ve ses bariyerini kırmak için nitroyu şarj edin. İstediğiniz zaman 360 ° yapmak için freni iki kez hafifçe vurun ve rakiplerinizi şık bir şekilde indirin.
EFSANE OLMAK
60 sezonu ve 800 yarışı tamamlayarak Kariyer modunda yolculuğunuza başlayın. Dünya Serisi Çok Oyunculu modunun farklı liglerinde gerçek zamanlı olarak 8 oyuncuya karşı yarışarak gerçek bir Asfalt efsanesi ol.
EN YÜKSEK YARIŞ KONTROLÜ
Oyuncuların yarış eğlencesine odaklanmasını sağlamak için direksiyonu kolaylaştıran yeni bir kontrol şeması olan yenilikçi TOUCH DRIVE’da ustalaşın. Ayrıca manuel kontrollere geçebilir (yönlendirmek için eğebilir veya hafifçe vurabilirsiniz) ve profesyonel bir Asfalt yarışçısı gibi nasıl sürüleceğini öğrenebilirsiniz.
SAYILARDAKİ GÜÇ
Asphalt serisinde ilk kez, Club özelliği ile kendi düşünen yarışçılar topluluğunu oluşturabilirsin. Milestone ödüllerinin kilidini açmak ve Kulüp lider tablosunda üst sıralara çıkmak için Kulüp üyelerinizle işbirliği yapın.
Asfalt 9: Efsaneler
entry.summary: Asphalt 9 San Francisco Körfezdeki Şehir DS Automobiles DS E-TENSE Hızlı Arabalarla Sizlerleyiz Asfalt 9: Efsaneler Gameloft tarafından App Store’dan indir https: //itunes.apple.com/ph/app/aspha … Play Store’dan indirin https: //play.google.com/store/apps/de … Microsoft Store’dan indirin https: //www.microsoft.com/en-us/p/asp … Dünyanın en korkusuz sürücülerini ele alın ve Asphalt 8: Airborne’un yaratıcılarından bir sonraki Asfalt Efsanesi olun. Asphalt 9: Legends, Ferrari, Porsche, Lamborghini ve W Motors gibi ünlü üreticilerin gerçek bir hiper otomobilleri içerir. Hayalinizdeki yolculuğu seçin ve dünyanın dört bir yanındaki muhteşem konumlarda yarışın. Sınırlarınızı toz içinde bırakın ve Pistin Efsanesi olun! ELLERİNİZİN PALMLARINDA BİR KONSOL DENEYİMİ Her bir yarışı gerçek bir gişe rekorları kıran filme dönüştüren titizlikle ayrıntılı gerçek arabalar, HDR teknikleri ve çarpıcı görsel ve parçacık efektleriyle kendinizi bu hiper gerçekçi arcade yarış oyununa bırakın. EN DEĞERLİ ARAÇLAR Dünyanın en şaşırtıcı 50 makinesinden fazlasını toplayın. Her araç, şimdiye kadar herhangi bir Asfalt oyununun en arzu edilen dizilimini oluşturmak için estetiğine ve yüksek performansına göre dikkatle seçildi. PARMAKLARINIZDA ÖZELLEŞTİRME Aracınızın tam rengini ve malzemelerini tanımlamak için yeni araba düzenleyicisini kullanın. Ayrıca Jantların ve Fren Kaliperleri’nin rengini seçebilir ve sürüşlerinizi tamamen özelleştirmek için karbon parçaları ekleyebilirsiniz. SOLUNUM YERLERİ En şaşırtıcı gerçek dünya konumlarında 70 pistte yerçekimine meydan okuyan yarışların heyecanını hissedin. Amerikan vahşi doğasındaki dev kasırgalar etrafında yarışın, Himalayalar’daki heyelanlardan kaçının ve harika stuntlar yapmak için rampalara çarpın. BİR ARCADE EĞLENCE Nihai Nitro Pulse’u serbest bırakmak ve ses bariyerini kırmak için nitroyu şarj edin. İstediğiniz zaman 360 ° yapmak için freni iki kez hafifçe vurun ve rakiplerinizi şık bir şekilde indirin. EFSANE OLMAK 60 sezonu ve 800 yarışı tamamlayarak Kariyer modunda yolculuğunuza başlayın. Dünya Serisi Çok Oyunculu modunun farklı liglerinde gerçek zamanlı olarak 8 oyuncuya karşı yarışarak gerçek bir Asfalt efsanesi ol. EN YÜKSEK YARIŞ KONTROLÜ Oyuncuların yarış eğlencesine odaklanmasını sağlamak için direksiyonu kolaylaştıran yeni bir kontrol şeması olan yenilikçi TOUCH DRIVE’da ustalaşın. Ayrıca manuel kontrollere geçebilir (yönlendirmek için eğebilir veya hafifçe vurabilirsiniz) ve profesyonel bir Asfalt yarışçısı gibi nasıl sürüleceğini öğrenebilirsiniz. SAYILARDAKİ GÜÇ Asphalt serisinde ilk kez, Club özelliği ile kendi düşünen yarışçılar topluluğunu oluşturabilirsin. Milestone ödüllerinin kilidini açmak ve Kulüp lider tablosunda üst sıralara çıkmak için Kulüp üyelerinizle işbirliği yapın. Asfalt 9: Efsaneler

entry.title: How the Way We Eat Has Changed During the Coronavirus Pandemic

link.title: How the Way We Eat Has Changed During the Coronavirus Pandemic

entry.content: Global events usually force people to rethink how they do everyday things. Everything from travel and socializing with friends, to working and spending time with family. However, one of the many things that has changed during the coronavirus pandemic is the way we eat. Veuer’s Nick Cardona has that story.
entry.summary: Global events usually force people to rethink how they do everyday things. Everything from travel and socializing with friends, to working and spending time with family. However, one of the many things that has changed during the coronavirus pandemic is the way we eat. Veuer’s Nick Cardona has that story.

entry.title: Startup Capital Log9 ‘Wonder’ Materials

link.title: Startup Capital Log9 ‘Wonder’ Materials

entry.content:
Graphene is hailed as a wonder material with seemingly countless applications from urban mobility to mopping up oil spills.
Log9 Materials is a Bengaluru-based cleantech startup, who are creating next-generation products using this wonder material.
entry.summary: Graphene is hailed as a wonder material with seemingly countless applications from urban mobility to mopping up oil spills. Log9 Materials is a Bengaluru-based cleantech startup, who are creating next-generation products using this wonder material.

entry.title: L’Espagne et l’Italie pourraient perdre la moitié de leur population d’ici à 2100

link.title: L’Espagne et l’Italie pourraient perdre la moitié de leur population d’ici à 2100

entry.content: La population mondiale pourrait décliner dès la deuxième moitié du siècle pour atteindre 8,8 milliards en 2100, soit 2 milliards de moins que les projections de l’ONU, selon une étude qui prédit des bouleversements dans l’équilibre mondial et au sein des sociétés. C’est «  une bonne nouvelle pour l’environnement », indique à l’Agence France-Presse Christopher Murray, directeur du respecté Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation (IHME) à Seattle.
entry.summary: La population mondiale pourrait décliner dès la deuxième moitié du siècle pour atteindre 8,8 milliards en 2100, soit 2 milliards de moins que les projections de l’ONU, selon une étude qui prédit des bouleversements dans l’équilibre mondial et au sein des sociétés. C’est « une bonne nouvelle pour l’environnement », indique à l’Agence France-Presse Christopher Murray, directeur du respecté Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation (IHME) à Seattle.

entry.title: Wesley Ira Purkey Executed In Second Federal Execution Since 2003

link.title: Wesley Ira Purkey Executed In Second Federal Execution Since 2003

entry.content: The second federal execution in almost two decades took place on July 16, 2020, just days after Daniel Lewis Lee was injected with a lethal dose of pentobarbital. Wesley Ira Purkey was convicted for the rape and murder of a 16-year-old girl in 2003, and was declared dead just after 8 a.m. at the Federal Correctional Complex in Terre Haute, Indiana.
entry.summary: The second federal execution in almost two decades took place on July 16, 2020, just days after Daniel Lewis Lee was injected with a lethal dose of pentobarbital. Wesley Ira Purkey was convicted for the rape and murder of a 16-year-old girl in 2003, and was declared dead just after 8 a.m. at the Federal Correctional Complex in Terre Haute, Indiana.
